name: Web Intl
description: Standard for localization — turning one UI into many locales: message formatting (Unicode MessageFormat 2.0), locale negotiation and fallback chains, lazy translation loading, and RTL/bidi adaptation. Native Intl and CSS logical properties are the default; FormatJS / i18next / Lingui plug in behind a translation registry. Defines the Localization protocol so message catalogs and locale strategies from different vendors are swappable and combinable.
tierEvidence: benchmarkCoverage covers i18n-rtl (intent:locale + intent:translation + protocol:localization); the named frameworks FormatJS / i18next / Lingui ship this surface (FUI ships intl/provider.ts + registry.ts behind the localization protocol).
